creator: rivers@dignus.com
text:
After installing the netscape 4.08 package, netscape communicator
	won't run, getting the message:
		/usr/libexec/ld.so: Undefined symbol "___inet_addr" called from netscape:/usr/X11R6/lib/aout/libX11.so.6.1 at 0x20a51944

	The X11R6/lib/aout libraries are installed.  In fact, since the
	package installed fine there is an implication that the
	appropriate run-time libraries are present.

How-To-Repeat: 
	On a newly installed 3.1-RELEASE system, install the netscape
	package and try and run it.

	Also - you will get the same symptoms from the 4.5 version of
	netscape available on ftp.netscape.com
